name: gtm-lifecycle
description: End-to-end GTM strategy process — elicit the real situation, draft a positioning brief with falsifiable bets, spar every bet adversarially, war-game the one-way doors, synthesize a challenged strategy. Use for "gtm", "go to market", "positioning", "find the wedge", "launch strategy", "who's the buyer". Depends on the spar plugin (spar:spar + spar:wargame).
